dispatch.title: Dispatch Public Task (Create Custom Task)
dispatch.commission-label: Commission (leave empty to use the original task commission)
dispatch.alert-message: Dispatch will create a new custom task based on the public task. BDs will not be directly linked to the original public task.
dispatch.select-bd-required: Please select at least one BD
dispatch.video-num-required: Video count must be greater than 0

publicTasks.alert-message: Below is the list of public tasks. Click "Apply" to submit an application. Once approved, a custom task will be created for you.

apply-modal.title: Confirm Application
apply-modal.confirm-message: Confirm application for the following public task?
apply-modal.tip: After submission, please wait for admin review. A custom task will be created for you upon approval.

messages.apply-success: Application submitted. Please wait for admin review.
messages.apply-failed: Application failed. Please try again later.

messages.preview-pdf-unavailable: Product information is missing, so the PDF is unavailable
messages.task-abandoned-blocked: This parent task has been abandoned, so you cannot open the KOL prepare upload page.

empty.description: There is no task data to display right now. Try adjusting the filters and check again.
empty.title: No Tasks Found

detail.has-bd: This KOL already belongs to a BD and cannot be prepared again.
detail.has-bd-with-code: This KOL already belongs to {0} and cannot be prepared again.
detail.kol-abnormal: This KOL is not in a normal collaborative state. Please verify the status first.
detail.kol-deleted: This KOL record has been deleted and cannot continue in the prepare flow.
detail.normal: This KOL is in a normal state and can be submitted for prepare.
detail.prepared-by-other: This KOL is already being prepared by another BD. Please use a different KOL.
detail.prepared-by-other-with-code: This KOL is currently being prepared by {0}. Please use a different KOL.
detail.retryable: This KOL was previously rejected and can be resubmitted now.
detail.task-duplicate: There is already an active prepare record for this KOL under the current task. Do not submit duplicates.

kol-prepare.empty-description: Upload an Excel template first, or click "Add Row" to enter KOL information manually before validation.
kol-prepare.invalid-alert-description: Please remove invalid rows or replace the KOLs before submitting. Rows marked as retryable can be kept.
kol-prepare.invalid-alert-title: There are unavailable KOLs in the current list

messages.has-invalid-data: There are invalid KOL rows. Please remove them before submitting.
messages.input-valid-kol-id: Please enter at least one valid KOL ID
messages.missing-kol-id-column: The kol_id column was not found
messages.missing-kol-link: KOL {0} is missing the KOL link. Please complete it before submitting.
messages.no-submittable-data: There is no KOL prepare data to submit
messages.no-valid-kol-id-in-excel: No valid KOL IDs were found in the Excel file
messages.parse-failed: Failed to parse the Excel file. Please check the format.
messages.save-failed: Save failed. Please try again later.
messages.task-abandoned-readonly: This task has been abandoned. You can no longer add, edit, or import KOL prepare data.
messages.task-abandoned-submit-blocked: This task has been abandoned. You can no longer submit the KOL prepare sheet.

kol-prepare.page-description: Upload Excel files or add KOL IDs manually. The system will pre-validate them against the current task assignment and KOL occupancy status, so you can organize the list before submitting prepare records.

task-status.abandoned-description: This parent task has been abandoned. You can still view historical submission records, but you can no longer add, edit, import, or submit KOL prepare data.
task-status.abandoned-title: This parent task has been abandoned

kol-prepare.records-description: Filter by review status and browse paginated KOL prepare records for the current task.
kol-prepare.result-description: There are {0} row(s) in total, including {1} available and {2} requiring action.
kol-prepare.result-filtered-tip: This is a filtered view. The full list contains {0} row(s).
kol-prepare.upload-card-description: The first row of the template must contain `kol_id` and `kol_link` columns. After import, you can continue editing or adding KOLs in the result table.

sop.title: SOP
sop.list-complete-confirm-content: Confirm completing this SOP directly? The backend will validate the current workflow state.

detail.heading: SOP Flow Detail
detail.description: Review the SOP flow and switch between stages from the step navigation.
detail.steps-subtitle: Click any step to switch content. Completed and current steps are visually distinguished.
detail.completed-description: This SOP has been completed. No further action is required for this workflow.
detail.terminate-confirm-content: After termination, this SOP will no longer continue. Do you want to terminate it now?
detail.terminate-form-description: After termination, this SOP will no longer continue. You may optionally add a remark before submitting.
detail.terminate-remark-placeholder: Enter the reason for termination or any follow-up note
detail.terminated-description: You are viewing the terminated state of this SOP.
detail.terminated-info-description: This section shows the termination reason for this SOP.
detail.terminated-tip: This SOP is terminated. You can still click each step to inspect placeholder content.

contact.budget-helper: An empty budget or 0 means no budget. Any value greater than 0 will trigger budget review.
contact.budget-placeholder: Leave empty or use 0 for no budget
contact.editable-tip: During the contact stage, BD users can review and edit contact details and budget information here.
contact.editing-hint: This SOP is still in the contact stage. After saving, the latest backend state will be used.
contact.empty-description: No contact detail is available yet. Please retry or reopen this SOP from the list.
contact.missing-sop-id: Missing task_sop_id. Contact detail cannot be loaded.
contact.readonly-hint: This SOP is no longer in the contact stage, so the page is now read-only and saving is disabled.
contact.readonly-tip: BD users can still view contact information after the contact stage, but editing is disabled.

sample.abandon-confirm-content: After abandoning, this pending sample request will no longer count as an active request. Continue?
sample.address-placeholder: Please enter the full delivery address
sample.detail-address-placeholder: Please enter detail address (house number, street, floor, etc.)
sample.no-districts: No districts found for this postcode
sample.confirm-received-confirm-content: After confirmation, this SOP package status will be updated to "Received". If backend validation passes, the SOP may move to the next stage. Continue?
sample.confirm-received-done-tip: This package is already marked as received. No further action is needed.
sample.confirm-received-empty-tip: Sample detail is not ready yet, so package receipt cannot be confirmed right now.
sample.confirm-received-missing-address-tip: The delivery address is incomplete, so package receipt cannot be confirmed yet.
sample.confirm-received-missing-both-tip: Both the delivery address and tracking number are missing, so package receipt cannot be confirmed yet.
sample.confirm-received-missing-tracking-tip: The tracking number is missing, so package receipt cannot be confirmed yet.
sample.confirm-received-ready-tip: The delivery address and tracking number are complete. You can now confirm package receipt.
sample.confirm-received-stage-tip: This SOP is no longer in the sample stage, so package receipt cannot be confirmed.
sample.current-empty-description: There is no active sample snapshot yet
sample.editable-tip: During the sample stage, BD users can review the current sample detail and submit a new request.
sample.empty-description: No sample detail is available yet. Please retry or reopen this SOP from the list.
sample.missing-sop-id: Missing task_sop_id. Sample detail cannot be loaded.
sample.modal-tip: Tracking number and delivered time are read-only on the BD side for now.
sample.readonly-fields-tip: Tracking number and delivered time are still maintained by the system snapshot. Package receipt can only be confirmed after both the address and tracking number are complete.
sample.readonly-tip: This SOP is no longer in the sample stage. You can still review sample detail and request history, but new submissions and abandon actions are disabled.
sample.request-card-description: This section shows the sample request history. Only pending requests can be abandoned by BD users.
sample.requests-empty-description: There are no sample requests yet
sample.requests-load-failed: Failed to load sample request history
sample.stage-changed-description: This SOP has already moved to the "{0}" stage, so sample actions are now disabled.

remittance.abandon-confirm-content: After abandoning, this pending remittance request will no longer count as an active request. Continue?
remittance.amount-required: Please enter an amount greater than 0
remittance.attachment-tip-content: Attachment links expire. If an image fails to load, the page will automatically refetch the detail once.
remittance.bank-card-placeholder: Please enter the bank card number
remittance.bank-card-required: Please enter the bank card number
remittance.complete-confirm-content: Confirm completing this SOP? The backend will validate whether the remittance requests satisfy the completion conditions.
remittance.complete-disabled-tip: This action is available only while the SOP is in the remittance stage.
remittance.complete-ready-tip: If the remittance requests already satisfy the backend rules, you can complete this SOP here.
remittance.create-confirm-content: Confirm submitting this remittance request? Chat screenshots will be uploaded before the request is sent.
remittance.create-modal-description: Fill in the remittance information and upload chat screenshots before submitting. Each submission creates a new remittance record.
remittance.detail-empty-description: There is no detail available for this request yet
remittance.detail-load-failed: Failed to load remittance request detail
remittance.editable-tip: During the remittance stage, BD users can review request history, create a new remittance request, and complete the SOP when the backend conditions are met.
remittance.empty-description: No remittance-stage information is available yet. Please retry or reopen this SOP from the list.
remittance.list-card-description: This section shows remittance request history. Open a record to load its detail. Only pending requests can be abandoned.
remittance.missing-sop-id: Missing task_sop_id. Remittance detail cannot be loaded.
remittance.no-budget-tip: This SOP has no budget. The remittance stage remains viewable for consistency, but submission and completion actions are disabled.
remittance.readonly-tip: This SOP is no longer in the remittance stage. You can still review request history and detail, but new submissions and abandon actions are disabled.
remittance.records-empty-description: There are no remittance requests yet
remittance.select-record-description: Select a remittance request on the left to view its detail
remittance.stage-changed-description: This SOP has already moved to the "{0}" stage, so remittance content is now displayed as read-only.
remittance.upload-file-invalid: One of the selected image files cannot be read. Please select it again.
remittance.upload-helper: Upload at least one chat screenshot. Image files only.
remittance.upload-type-invalid: Only JPG, JPEG, or PNG images are supported
remittance.upload-required: Please upload at least one chat screenshot

video.complete-confirm-content: This is a no-budget flow. After confirmation, this SOP will move to the completed stage. Continue?
video.complete-disabled-tip: For no-budget flows, you can complete this SOP only after the video URL and upload time have both been submitted.
video.complete-ready-tip: This is a no-budget flow and the video detail has been submitted, so the SOP can now be completed manually.
video.editable-tip: During the video recovery stage, BD users can submit the video URL, upload time, and optional Ads Code. After submission, this section becomes read-only.
video.empty-description: No video-stage detail is available yet. Please retry or reopen this SOP from the list.
video.missing-sop-id: Missing task_sop_id. Video-stage detail cannot be loaded.
video.readonly-rule-tip: Once the video information is submitted successfully, BD users can no longer edit it. Please double-check the URL and upload time before confirming.
video.readonly-tip: The video information has already been submitted, or this SOP is no longer in the video recovery stage, so the page is now read-only.
video.stage-changed-description: This SOP has already moved to the "{0}" stage, so video-stage detail is now displayed as read-only.
video.submit-confirm-content: After submission, BD users will no longer be able to edit this video information, and the SOP may move to the next stage. Continue?
video.upload-time-required: Please select a valid upload time

delete.confirm-content: Are you sure to delete shop {0}?
